title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy Act, 2017. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act.
footnote: 1. 22nd January, 2018, vide notification No. S.O. 272(E), dated 17th January, 2018, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
